title: Incredible Iced Brazilian Chicken Fondue
description: A satvik-friendly, comforting Brazilian dish featuring floral and juicy flavors, made with chicken stock, and served in a fondue pot.
instructions: Cut the chicken breast into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour, egg, and cornstarch.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the flour mixture.
Heat the coconut oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 180°C.
Fry the chicken pieces in batches until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove the fried chicken from the oil and drain on paper towels.
In a large pot or fondue pot, heat the chicken stock over medium heat.
Add the fried chicken to the pot and simmer in the stock for 5 minutes.
Season the chicken with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken in the fondue pot, garnished with chopped cilantro.
To make the iced fondue sauce, mix together water and cornstarch in a small bowl.
Add the cornstarch mixture to the pot with the chicken and stir to combine.
